response.justification: Bogdan is a strong candidate with a rare and highly relevant combination of deep experience in geospatial data systems (as a founder of GISCollective) and high-performance, low-latency backend development. While his professional C++ experience is not recent, his extensive work with the systems language DLang and his demonstrated ability to work across diverse technology stacks suggest he can quickly become productive in a modern C++ environment. His seniority and background in building data-intensive applications make him a compelling fit for the role's challenges.
strengths: Extensive, hands-on experience building geospatial data platforms, directly relevant to the role's domain.
Proven ability to engineer high-performance, low-latency distributed systems handling massive request volumes.
Strong aptitude for systems programming demonstrated through C++ and extensive DLang projects.
concerns: Professional C++ experience is over 7 years old, with most recent work in TypeScript and Node.js.
Geospatial experience appears focused on data collection and mapping, not specifically on routing algorithms or tile optimization.
Resume shows frequent job changes, with several tenures lasting less than two years.
